parameters.query: INSERT INTO geo_stats (ad_id, country_code, date, shows, clicks, money, postbacks_confirmed_money, roi) SELECT {{ $json.ad_id }}, d->>'country', CURRENT_DATE, COALESCE((d->>'shows')::int, 0), COALESCE((d->>'clicks')::int, 0), COALESCE((d->>'spend')::decimal, 0), 0, COALESCE((d->>'roi')::decimal, 0) FROM jsonb_array_elements('{{ JSON.stringify($json.details).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb) AS d;
